findings.title: No global rate limiting on API endpoints
findings.description: Found 27 FastAPI routes in main.py with no global rate-limit middleware (slowapi / shared limiter). A client could flood authenticated or expensive routes. POST /webhook is rate-limited in gateway/webhook.py (per-IP); remaining routes in main.py may still be unbounded.
findings.evidence: Endpoints: GET /health, GET /dashboard, GET /, GET /tv_health_check, GET /api/mcp/status
findings.remediation: Add app-wide or per-route rate limits (e.g. slowapi). Keep webhook-specific limits in gateway/webhook.py.

findings.title: DRY_RUN mode overridable via environment variable
findings.description: BINANCE_DRY_RUN is loaded from environment at startup. If .env file is writable or env can be injected, an attacker could disable dry-run mode and execute real trades.
findings.remediation: Add runtime validation: if production, force DRY_RUN=true unless explicit unlock.
